title: Prompt Engineering Isn't Dead, It's Grown Up
description: Why structured outputs, JSON mode, and programmatic prompt optimization are making prompt engineering reliable, testable, and production-ready.
linkedinHook: Your LLM-powered feature just broke production because a language model decided to return a poem instead of JSON. Sound familiar?
linkedinBody: We've all been there with brittle prompt engineering. This post breaks down how structured outputs, programmatic optimization, and A/B testing are bringing sanity and reliability to LLM integrations in production. It’s about building stable systems, not just clever prompts.
